summary: Comprehensive testing of Petbookin Phase 1 - All core features working. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in user registration. Backend: 32/32 tests passed. Frontend: All navigation, auth, feed, pets, breeder, admin, search, and settings features working.

fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId not JSON serializable - causing 500 error on registration
fixed.fix: Excluded '_id' from user_out dict in auth.py register and google-session endpoints

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Coral (#FF7A6A) + Mustard (#F2B824) theme is correctly applied
Left sidebar navigation works correctly on all pages
Admin dashboard shows correct stats (Users, Pets, Posts, Verified Breeders)
MySpace-style theme customization in Settings works with preset themes and custom colors
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup. Test data created during pytest runs (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 complete and tested. All auth flows (register, login, Google OAuth redirect), feed (posts, likes, comments), pets CRUD, breeder registry (register, credentials), admin dashboard (stats, users, roles, tiers), search, and settings (profile, theme) are working. MongoDB ObjectId bug was fixed. Stripe integration is NOT implemented yet (Membership page shows tiers but subscribe buttons are placeholder).

features_tested.landing_page: ✓ Hero section, login/signup buttons, feature cards
features_tested.user_login: ✓ Admin login with correct credentials working
features_tested.auth_session: ✓ /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token
features_tested.feed_page: ✓ Create post, like post, comment on post, delete post
features_tested.my_pets_page: ✓ Add pet form visible, existing pets displayed with AI Bio button
features_tested.breeder_registry: ✓ Register as breeder, add external credential (AKC/CKC), get Petbookin credential
features_tested.search: ✓ Search pets, users, breeders, posts - all working
features_tested.settings: ✓ Profile update, theme customization with presets and custom colors
features_tested.admin_dashboard: ✓ Stats displayed, user list, role/tier assignment
features_tested.google_oauth: ✓ Button present and configured to redirect to auth.emergentagent.com
